data.description:

data.title: Widgie Nickel Limited Announces Quotation of New Securities on ASX
data.description:
The latest update is out from Widgie Nickel Limited ( (AU:WIN) ).

Widgie Nickel Limited has announced the application for the quotation of 312,500 fully paid ordinary securities on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX), effective October 17, 2025. This move is part of the company’s strategy to enhance its capital structure and potentially increase its market presence, which could have implications for its operational capabilities and investor relations.

More about Widgie Nickel Limited

Widgie Nickel Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of nickel resources. The company is engaged in producing nickel, a critical component in battery manufacturing and other industrial applications, positioning itself to meet the growing demand for nickel in the global market.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: M Vest Water Secures Trial Order with METHA for Hamburg Dredging Plant
data.description:
M Vest Water AS ( (DE:7YA) ) has issued an announcement.

M Vest Water (MVW) has received a purchase order from METHA for a long-term trial at the dredging plant in Hamburg, scheduled to start in November. The trial involves using MVW’s NORWAFLOC® products for dewatering dredging sludge, potentially leading to long-term contracts if successful. METHA, a leader in sustainable dredging management, handles significant sludge volumes to maintain port operations, and this trial represents a substantial portion of their current treatment capacity.

More about M Vest Water AS

M Vest Water is an environmental technology company specializing in water treatment solutions for both industrial and municipal markets. Their products are non-toxic, biodegradable, and environmentally friendly, offering high purification efficiency in a cost-effective manner. The company is listed on Euronext Growth under the ticker MVW.

Average Trading Volume: 16,192

Current Market Cap: NOK252.6M

data.title: GBM Resources Limited Announces 2025 Annual General Meeting
data.description:

data.title: SportsHero Expands Gaming Catalogue with V-Hunt Partnership
data.description:
SportsHero Limited ( (AU:SHO) ) has shared an update.

SportsHero Limited has expanded its mobile gaming catalogue by signing an agreement with V Hunt Digital Media Pvt Ltd to distribute approximately 600 hyper casual mobile games throughout Southeast Asia. This strategic move is expected to enhance SportsHero’s gaming subscription platform, although the commercial impact remains uncertain until the platform goes live. The agreement is set for a year with automatic renewals, and the company will update stakeholders on revenue projections as the platform develops.

More about SportsHero Limited

SportsHero Limited operates in the mobile gaming industry, focusing on providing a diverse catalogue of hyper casual mobile games. The company aims to enhance user experience through its gaming platforms, with a market focus on Southeast Asia.

data.title: Prisma Properties to Present Q3 2025 Financial Report
data.description:
Prisma Properties AB ( (SE:PRISMA) ) has shared an announcement.

Prisma Properties is set to release its Q3 2025 financial report on October 24, with a presentation led by CEO Fredrik Mässing and CFO Martin Lindqvist. The event will be accessible via webcast and teleconference, allowing stakeholders to engage and ask questions. This announcement highlights the company’s commitment to transparency and stakeholder engagement, potentially impacting its market perception and investor relations.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:PRISMA) stock is a Hold with a SEK27.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Prisma Properties AB stock, see the SE:PRISMA Stock Forecast page.

More about Prisma Properties AB

Prisma Properties is a leading developer and owner of modern properties focusing on long-term discount retail, grocery retail, and quick-service restaurant sectors. The company owns nearly 140 properties, primarily in Sweden and Denmark, and aims to expand further across the Nordic region. It emphasizes sustainability and accessibility by investing in next-generation retail centers and electric vehicle charging stations. Prisma Properties is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm Mid Cap under the ticker code PRISMA, with its head office in Stockholm.

data.title: 3-D Matrix and Harvard Achieve Breakthrough in Cardiac Regenerative Therapy
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from 3-D Matrix ( (JP:7777) ).

3-D Matrix, Ltd. has achieved a significant breakthrough in cardiac regenerative therapy through its collaborative research with Harvard University, which was published in the journal Science. The study demonstrated that the company’s self-assembling peptide, RADA16, can suppress arrhythmogenic automaticity in iPSC-derived cardiomyocytes and enhance their integration with host cardiac tissue, potentially accelerating the practical application of iPSC-based therapies for heart disease and advancing regenerative medicine for other tissues requiring vascularization.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:7777) stock is a Hold with a Yen339.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on 3-D Matrix stock, see the JP:7777 Stock Forecast page.

More about 3-D Matrix

3-D Matrix, Ltd. is a company engaged in the development of medical products based on proprietary self-assembling peptide technology, focusing on regenerative medicine through collaborations with leading academic institutions worldwide.

Average Trading Volume: 4,268,393

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen31.64B
